creator: cowbert@gmail.com
text:
Miss post-processed diff for pkg-plist.

sed -e 's#freetds-0\.82\.1\.dev\.20081111/##' patch.txt before applying!

On Wed, Dec 3, 2008 at 11:10 PM,  <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
